ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_favored_by" INTEGER /* Number of points the home team is favored by */,
  "final_home_score" INTEGER /* Final score of the home team */,
  "final_away_score" INTEGER /* Final score of the away team */,
  "final_score_diff" INTEGER /* Final score difference */,
  "final_win_prob" REAL /* Final win probability of the home team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season in which the game was played */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, playoff, championship) */,
  "neutral_site" INTEGER /* Whether the game was played at a neutral site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference in which the team plays */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division within the conference */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., PG, SG, SF, PF, C) */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plays" (
  "play_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each play */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the play belongs to */,
  "half" INTEGER /* Half of the game (1 or 2) */,
  "time_remaining_half" TEXT /* Time remaining in the half (e.g., 20:00) */,
  "secs_remaining" INTEGER /* Seconds remaining in the half */,
  "secs_remaining_absolute" INTEGER /* Seconds remaining in the game */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the play */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team at the time of the play */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team at the time of the play */,
  "score_diff" INTEGER /* Score difference at the time of the play */,
  "win_prob" REAL /* Win probability of the home team at the time of the play */,
  "home_timeout_ind" INTEGER /* Indicator for home team timeout (1 if timeout taken, 0 otherwise) */,
  "away_timeout_ind" INTEGER /* Indicator for away team timeout (1 if timeout taken, 0 otherwise) */,
  "play_result" TEXT /* Result of the play (e.g., score, turnover, rebound) */,
  "play_type" TEXT /* Type of the play (e.g., shot, pass, dribble) */,
  "shot_zone" TEXT /* Zone from which the shot was taken (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("play_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plays_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "play_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "play_id" INTEGER /* ID of the play the event belongs to */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., shot, turnover, foul) */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player involved in the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the event (e.g., made, missed, blocked) */,
  "event_subtype" TEXT /* Subtype of the event (e.g., three-pointer, layup) */,
  "event_result" TEXT /* Result of the event (e.g., score, turnover, rebound) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_play_events_play_id FOREIGN KEY ("play_id") REFERENCES plays ("play_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_play_events_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "timeouts" (
  "timeout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each timeout */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the timeout belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team taking the timeout */,
  "half" INTEGER /* Half of the game (1 or 2) */,
  "time_remaining_half" TEXT /* Time remaining in the half when the timeout was taken */,
  "secs_remaining" INTEGER /* Seconds remaining in the half when the timeout was taken */,
  "secs_remaining_absolute" INTEGER /* Seconds remaining in the game when the timeout was taken */,
  "timeout_length" INTEGER /* Length of the timeout in seconds */,
  "timeout_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the timeout (e.g., injury, strategy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timeout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timeouts_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timeouts_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "score_changes" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score change */,
  "play_id" INTEGER /* ID of the play the score change belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team scoring the points */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Number of points scored */,
  "new_score" INTEGER /* New score after the points are added */,
  "score_change_type" TEXT /* Type of score change (e.g., basket, free throw) */,
  "score_change_subtype" TEXT /* Subtype of score change (e.g., three-pointer, layup) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_score_changes_play_id FOREIGN KEY ("play_id") REFERENCES plays ("play_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_score_changes_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fouls" (
  "foul_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each foul */,
  "play_id" INTEGER /* ID of the play the foul belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team committing the foul */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player committing the foul */,
  "foul_type" TEXT /* Type of the foul (e.g., personal, technical) */,
  "penalty" TEXT /* Penalty for the foul (e.g., free throw, turnover) */,
  "foul_subtype" TEXT /* Subtype of the foul (e.g., holding, pushing) */,
  "foul_result" TEXT /* Result of the foul (e.g., free throw, turnover) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("foul_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fouls_play_id FOREIGN KEY ("play_id") REFERENCES plays ("play_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fouls_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fouls_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assists" (
  "assist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assist */,
  "play_id" INTEGER /* ID of the play the assist belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player making the assist */,
  "assist_type" TEXT /* Type of assist (e.g., pass, drive) */,
  "assist_subtype" TEXT /* Subtype of assist (e.g., bounce pass, chest pass) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assists_play_id FOREIGN KEY ("play_id") REFERENCES plays ("play_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assists_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rebounds" (
  "rebound_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rebound */,
  "play_id" INTEGER /* ID of the play the rebound belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player making the rebound */,
  "rebound_type" TEXT /* Type of rebound (e.g., defensive, offensive) */,
  "rebound_subtype" TEXT /* Subtype of rebound (e.g., tip-in, put-back) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rebound_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rebounds_play_id FOREIGN KEY ("play_id") REFERENCES plays ("play_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rebounds_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "turnovers" (
  "turnover_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each turnover */,
  "play_id" INTEGER /* ID of the play the turnover belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team committing the turnover */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player committing the turnover */,
  "turnover_type" TEXT /* Type of turnover (e.g., ball handling, shot clock) */,
  "turnover_subtype" TEXT /* Subtype of turnover (e.g., bad pass, lost ball) */,
  "turnover_result" TEXT /* Result of the turnover (e.g., possession, score) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("turnover_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_turnovers_play_id FOREIGN KEY ("play_id") REFERENCES plays ("play_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_turnovers_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_turnovers_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game accessed (if applicable) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the platform was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent information (e.g., browser, device) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
